PREVIOUS LOG (Last Submission)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Symptoms: {{ $('Points calculation').item.json.symptoms_string }}
Sleep: {{ $('Points calculation').item.json.previous_sleep }} hours
Stress: {{ $('Points calculation').item.json.previous_stress }}/10
Energy: {{ $('Points calculation').item.json.previous_energy }}/10

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
TRENDS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Sleep Trend: {{ $('Points calculation').item.json.sleep_trend }}
Stress Trend: {{ $('Points calculation').item.json.stress_trend }}
Energy Trend:{{ $('Points calculation').item.json.energy_trend }}
Symptom Trend: {{ $('Points calculation').item.json.symptom_trend }}

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
STRICT INSTRUCTIONS (FOLLOW EXACTLY)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

1. Compare current vs previous symptoms.
2. Identify:
   - new_symptoms
   - resolved_symptoms
   - persistent_symptoms

3. Determine improvement_status:
   - IMPROVING
   - WORSENING
   - STABLE

4. Write a short progress_message (1 line only).

5. Predict ONE condition:
   - condition_1
   - probability_1 (number only)
   - confidence_1 (number only)

6. Provide:
   - remedy_1

7. Provide actions:
   - immediate_action_1
   - immediate_action_2
   - immediate_action_3

8. Provide wellness tips:
   - hydration_reminder
   - break_reminder
   - sleep_tip
   - stress_relief_tip
   - wellness_tip

9. Provide follow_up_needed:
   ONLY one of:
   - YES - Consult doctor
   - MONITOR
   - NO

10. Provide disclaimer (short).

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
CRITICAL OUTPUT RULES (VERY IMPORTANT)
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

- Return ONLY a valid JSON object
- DO NOT wrap in quotes
- DO NOT add text before or after
- DO NOT use markdown (no ```json)
- DO NOT escape JSON
- All keys must match exactly
- Numbers must be numbers (not strings)
- Empty fields should be ""

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
OUTPUT FORMAT
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

{
  "improvement_status": "",
  "progress_message": "",
  "previous_symptoms": "",
  "new_symptoms": "",
  "resolved_symptoms": "",
  "persistent_symptoms": "",

  "condition_1": "",
  "probability_1": 0,
  "confidence_1": 0,
  "remedy_1": "",

  "immediate_action_1": "",
  "immediate_action_2": "",
  "immediate_action_3": "",

  "hydration_reminder": "",
  "break_reminder": "",
  "sleep_tip": "",
  "stress_relief_tip": "",
  "wellness_tip": "",

  "follow_up_needed": "",
  "disclaimer": ""
}
DON'T INCLUSE ANT EXTRA COMMAS
